prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business."
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others."
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me."
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me."
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Wow! What did you get?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful."
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water."
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill."
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Gina said: "Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!"
[4:04 pm on 20 January, 2023] Jon said: "Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
